issues.description: Missing conditional check 'If you only have {Celestial Dragons} type Characters' – should be wrapped in a condition with LeaderHasAnyType or character filter, not unconditional
'You may trash 1 card' should use maxCount:1 on TrashFromHand filter to enforce exactly 1 card, and the entire action should be optional (conditional branch)
K.O. up to 2 characters should be a single KO action with maxCount:2, not two separate KO actions
